announcements.text: Bank Of India Has informed About One To One Physical Investor / Analyst Meet With M/S Schonfeld Strategic Advisors. 4 Jun - Bank of India held a one-to-one physical investor meeting with Schonfeld Strategic Advisors on 04 June 2026.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Management 3 Jun - Shri Lalit Taneja appointed as CVO of Bank of India, effective 03.06.2026.
Bank Of India Has informed About The One To One Virtual Investor/Analyst Meet. 3 Jun - Bank of India held a one-to-one virtual meeting with Balyasny on 03.06.2026; no UPSI shared.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Analyst / Investor Meet - Outcome 2 Jun - Bank of India participated in BofA India Conference 2026 with several institutional investors.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Management 1 Jun - Bank of India elevates Shri Vikash Krishna from General Manager to Chief General Manager effective June 1, 2026.
